rooms.name: Entrance Hall
rooms.description: A grand hall with marble floors and high ceilings. A crystal chandelier hangs overhead. Exits lead north to a library, east to a kitchen, and south to a garden.

rooms.name: Library
rooms.description: Tall bookshelves line every wall, crammed with leather-bound volumes. A reading desk sits in the center of the room. A narrow staircase leads up.

rooms.name: Garden
rooms.description: A walled garden overgrown with ivy and wildflowers. A stone fountain stands in the center, dry and cracked. A path continues south to a pond.

rooms.name: Pond
rooms.description: A small, murky pond surrounded by reeds and flat stones. The water is still and dark. The garden lies back to the north.

rooms.name: Study
rooms.description: A cozy room at the top of the narrow staircase. A wooden cabinet stands against one wall. The only exit is back down.
